---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 
```{r message=FALSE}
library(pracma)
#library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(ggpubr)
library(superheat)
library(fs)
```
## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```


```{r message=FALSE}
Wb_df_long <- WB_df %>% pivot_longer(cols = c("MLC", "pMLC", "Arp3", "GAPDH"), values_to = "Int", names_to = "Protein") %>% na.omit()
Wb_df_long$sample_ID <- paste (Wb_df_long$Exp, Wb_df_long$Sample, sep = "_")
Wb_df_long$film <-  paste (Wb_df_long$Wb_run, Wb_df_long$Exposure, sep = "_")
Wb_df_long$run_sample <-  paste (Wb_df_long$Wb_run, Wb_df_long$sample_ID, sep = "_")
```


```{r message=FALSE}

# get the minimal value of each film group
Wb_df_long <- Wb_df_long %>% as.data.table()

GAPDH_df <- Wb_df_long[Protein=="GAPDH"] %>% 
transform(Min_Int = ave(Int, film, FUN = min))

Arp3_df <- Wb_df_long[Protein=="Arp3"] %>% 
transform(Min_Int = ave(Int, film, FUN = min))

MLC_df <- Wb_df_long[Protein=="MLC"] %>% 
transform(Min_Int = ave(Int, film, FUN = min))

pMLC_df <- Wb_df_long[Protein=="pMLC"] %>% 
transform(Min_Int = ave(Int, film, FUN = min))

# normalization with the minimal value of each film group
GAPDH_df$Int_norm1 <- GAPDH_df$Int/GAPDH_df$Min_Int
Arp3_df$Int_norm1 <- Arp3_df$Int/Arp3_df$Min_Int
MLC_df$Int_norm1 <- MLC_df$Int/MLC_df$Min_Int
pMLC_df$Int_norm1 <- pMLC_df$Int/pMLC_df$Min_Int
```

```{r message=FALSE}
# average value of the sample over different films (exposure times) in each run (tech duplication)
GAPDH_df2 <- GAPDH_df %>% group_by(run_sample, WT_KO, Protein, Exp, Wb_run, sample_ID) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Int_norm1)
Arp3_df2 <- Arp3_df  %>% group_by(run_sample, WT_KO, Protein, Exp, Wb_run, sample_ID) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Int_norm1)
MLC_df2<- MLC_df %>% group_by(run_sample, WT_KO, Protein, Exp, Wb_run, sample_ID) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Int_norm1)
pMLC_df2<- pMLC_df %>% group_by(run_sample, WT_KO, Protein, Exp, Wb_run, sample_ID) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Int_norm1)
```


```{r}
Wb_df_long_2 <- rbind (GAPDH_df2, Arp3_df2 , MLC_df2 , pMLC_df2) 

#Wb_df_long_2$uni_ID <- paste(Wb_df_long_2$sample_ID, Wb_df_long_2$film, sep = "_")

Wb_df_wide_2 <- Wb_df_long_2 %>% pivot_wider(id_cols = c("Exp", "Wb_run", "WT_KO", "sample_ID"), names_from = "Protein", values_from = "median")

# normalization with normalized GAPDH
Wb_df_wide_2$Arp3 <- Wb_df_wide_2$Arp3/Wb_df_wide_2$GAPDH
Wb_df_wide_2$MLC <- Wb_df_wide_2$MLC/Wb_df_wide_2$GAPDH
Wb_df_wide_2$pMLC <- Wb_df_wide_2$pMLC/Wb_df_wide_2$GAPDH

# average value of the sample over different WB runs (tech duplication)
Arp3_df3 <- Wb_df_wide_2 %>% group_by(sample_ID, WT_KO, Exp) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(Arp3)
MLC_df3 <- Wb_df_wide_2 %>% group_by(sample_ID, WT_KO, Exp) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(MLC)
pMLC_df3 <- Wb_df_wide_2 %>% group_by(sample_ID, WT_KO, Exp) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(pMLC)
```


```{r, fig.width=6, echo=FALSE}

my_comparisons <- list(c("WT", "KO"),c("WT", "Het"), c("Het", "KO"))

Arp3_df3  %>% mutate(WT_KO = factor(WT_KO, levels=c("WT", "KO", "Het"))) %>%
ggplot( aes(x=WT_KO, y=median, fill =WT_KO) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
# geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
  geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-50, 1500), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method="wilcox.test")+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "Arp3.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r, fig.width=6, echo=FALSE}
MLC_df3  %>% mutate(WT_KO = factor(WT_KO, levels=c("WT", "KO", "Het"))) %>%
ggplot( aes(x=WT_KO, y=median, fill =WT_KO) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
# geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white", outlier.colour = NA)+ 
   geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-5, 50), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method="wilcox.test")+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "MLC.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r, fig.width=6, echo=FALSE}
pMLC_df3  %>%  mutate(WT_KO = factor(WT_KO, levels=c("WT", "KO", "Het"))) %>%
ggplot( aes(x=WT_KO, y=median, fill =WT_KO) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
# geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, fill="white")+ 
   geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-5, 20), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method="wilcox.test")+
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "pMLC.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

saveRDS(df_1, file = "GC_coloc.rds")
```
